backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the incident management backend with CRUD operations: create incidents, add updates, change status, delete resolved incidents, and query all incidents stored in a persistent map.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light (`:root`) and dark (`.dark`) themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and semantic UI color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together ThemeProvider, React Query client, TanStack Router (with `/` and `/admin` routes sharing a Layout), and a Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/AddUpdateForm.ts: React Hook Form-based form for appending a timestamped update message to a selected incident, showing current service/severity/status context before submission.
frontend/src/components/ChangeStatusForm: Form component for changing an incident's status, with an incident selector dropdown that displays the current status and a new-status selector with color-coded dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/CreateIncidentFo: A React form component for creating new incidents, using react-hook-form for validation, checking ID uniqueness before submission, and accepting fields for ID, title, description, affected service, and severity.
frontend/src/components/IncidentCard.tsx: A collapsible card component that displays incident details including severity, status, affected service, timestamps, description, and a sorted list of updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, theme toggle, logout button, and a footer wrapping child content.
frontend/src/components/SeverityBadge.ts: A badge component that renders a color-coded, labeled severity indicator (critical, major, minor, informational) with an animated dot for critical severity.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A badge component that renders a color-coded label for incident statuses (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved).
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend incident operations: fetching all/single incidents, creating, updating, changing status, deleting, and checking ID uniqueness.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Wraps next-themes to expose the current resolved theme, a dark mode boolean, and a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status and severity color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin page gated behind Internet Identity authentication, providing tabbed forms to create incidents, add updates, change status, and delete resolved incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Public dashboard page that fetches and displays all incidents split into active and resolved sections, with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 27) for a district IT status page dashboard with public read-only view and authenticated admin panel, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues including backend connectivity and canister stopped errors.
